name: law 12: an unclosed whitelist tag styles through the end of the string

then.text: Start then italic to the end

name: law 12: a stray closing tag with no matching opener is dropped, its neighbours stay plain
law 12: an unclosed inner tag under an open outer tag styles the tail with both styles

then.text: bold and italic to the end

name: law 12: a stray close for an unknown tag is dropped like any unknown tag
